summary: Comprehensive testing of Website Settings CMS, Vendor Dashboard, and Affiliate Dashboard features completed. 17/17 backend API tests passed. UI testing verified all sections are accessible and functional. Fixed missing fields in WebsiteSettings schema.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed WebsiteSettings schema - added missing fields: youtube_url, theme_secondary_color, announcement_bar_text, announcement_bar_enabled
All Website Settings sections working: General Settings, Theme Colors, SEO Settings, Social Media Links, Analytics & Tracking, Announcement Bar, Navigation Menu
Vendor Dashboard shows registration form for non-vendors, dashboard with stats for vendors
Affiliate Dashboard shows referral code, earnings stats, commission structure, and social share buttons
seed_data_creation: Test affiliate user and menu items created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Website Settings CMS fully functional at /admin/settings. Schema updated with all required fields. Vendor registration at /vendor, Affiliate dashboard at /affiliate both working.

features_tested.admin_website_settings_section: PASS - General Settings, Theme Colors (color pickers), SEO Settings, Social Links, Analytics IDs (GA, GTM, FB Pixel), Announcement Bar toggle + text, Navigation Menu add/delete
features_tested.cms_settings_get_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/cms/settings returns all fields including new youtube_url, theme_secondary_color, announcement_bar_text, announcement_bar_enabled
features_tested.cms_menus_delete_endpoint: PASS - DELETE /api/cms/menus/{id} soft deletes menu (admin only)
features_tested.vendor_dashboard_page: PASS - Shows registration form for non-vendors with all required fields
features_tested.vendor_register_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/vendor/register updates user to vendor role
features_tested.vendor_dashboard_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/vendor/dashboard returns vendor stats (requires vendor role)
features_tested.affiliate_registration_page: PASS - Shows benefits and how-it-works for non-affiliates
features_tested.affiliate_dashboard_page: PASS - Shows referral code, earnings stats, commission structure
features_tested.affiliate_register_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/affiliate/register creates affiliate with referral code
features_tested.affiliate_earnings_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/affiliate/earnings returns payouts and earnings
